name: Hypnotic Zombie Escape Endless Jump
description: Welcome to Hypnotic Zombie Escape - Endless Jump, a fast-paced arcade platformer where your reflexes and focus are put to the ultimate test! Take control of a creepy neon zombie and jump your way up through an endless, perilous vertical maze. But there is a catch: the background is a constantly shifting, pulsating hypnotic illusion designed to distract you! Can you keep your eyes on the platforms while the world spins around you?
instructions: Arrow keys on mobile click and scroll
